name: Worm Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mung bean sprouts (worms) with warm water.
2. In a clean mixing bowl, combine one cup of the sprouts, ground beef, and raw egg.
3. Reserve the remaining sprouts for later use.
4. Form the mixture into six patties.
5. Season each patty with salt and pepper.
6. Place the patties in the frying pan and cook on medium heat until well browned on one side.
7. Carefully turn the patties and season again.
8. Cook until the second side is well browned.
9. Serve on hamburger buns.
10. Garnish with the remaining mung bean sprouts sprinkled on top.
- Do not forget to add any pus and blood, if desired.
- Serves 6 worm slurpers.
- Sicko serving suggestion: Use a clean hole punch to create lettuce garnishes.
